author: agentstage-portal
constraints: Prioritize human readability and scanning over dense data packing.
Keep a single clear focal area per view.
Use concise headings and avoid redundant chrome.
Prefer high-contrast text and accessible color pairings.
Preserve enough whitespace to separate navigation from content.
Avoid decorative UI that competes with the embedded page content.
forbidden_patterns: Generic username labels not derived from workspace folder names.
Overcrowded sidebars that hide page titles or truncate navigation context.
notes: Skill-level defaults. Task-level user instructions can override without mutating this file unless explicitly requested.
